message.content:
@startuml
actor Actor
participant Boundary #LightBlue2
entity Entity #LightBlue3
control Control1 #Pink4
control Control2 #Green5

Actor -> Boundary : authorization Request\nactivate Boundary
Boundary->Entity:gson.fromJson(user, User.class);\nactivate Entity
Boundary-->Control1:userService.userValidation(user)\ndeactivate Entity \n activate Control1 
Control1 --> Control2:tokenService.createToken(user.getName())\n deactivate  Control1 \n activate Control2  
Control2 -[#dashed]->> Control1: Token \ndestroy Control2 

deactivate Control1


Boundary <-[hidden]-#dotted- Control1: Token 


destroy Control1



Boundary -->> Actor:authorization Response Token \ndestroy Boundary




@enduml
